name: TranslationResolverService

neutralConcepts: Step 1 tenant cache via F1523.findRef(ALS.tenantId, moduleId, locale)
Step 2 inline policy gate via T669 (CF-812 never throws)
Step 4 marketplace delta path — delta empty shortcut OR delta translate+merge
Step 5 full tenant translation via IAiProvider.generateStructured (FAST role)
ALL exceptions → { fallback: true, locale: 'en' } via CF-812
AI JSON schema validation failure → fallback (CF-815)

ironRules.rule: HTTP 200 in ALL execution paths. No 4xx or 5xx from this endpoint. Errors, denied policies, and AI failures all produce { fallback: true, locale: 'en' }.
IAiProvider.generateStructured() invalid JSON → fallback path. No partial translation written to CAS.

keywords: translation resolver orchestration pipeline cache policy gate marketplace delta AI fallback always-200 i18n-translation FLOW-48
